tagline: Pools and Gardens for Fine Homes

hero.headline:
Luxury Pools Designed for Fine
Dallas Homes
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Harold Leidner has designed and built the most distinguished pools, gardens, and outdoor living spaces across Dallas-Fort Worth. From concept to construction to ongoing care, we bring your vision to life with meticulous craftsmanship.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block">Design & Construction
services.subtitle: From custom pools and spas to lush gardens and outdoor entertaining spaces, we craft every element of your property's exterior with the artistry and precision that fine homes demand.

cards.title: Custom Pools & Spas
cards.description: Luxury swimming pools and spas designed as the centerpiece of your outdoor living space. Classic, modern, or transitional styles tailored to your home's architecture.

cards.title: Water Features & Fountains
cards.description: Elegant fountains, waterfalls, and decorative water elements that add movement and tranquility to your landscape. Each one custom-designed for your property.

cards.title: Outdoor Structures
cards.description: Custom pergolas, pavilions, cabanas, and covered living areas that extend your home's footprint into the outdoors with seamless architectural integration.

cards.title: Recreation & Entertainment
cards.description: Sport courts, putting greens, fire pits, and outdoor kitchens that transform your property into a private resort for entertaining and leisure.

cards.title: Garden & Landscape Design
cards.description: Full-service landscape architecture from lush English gardens to native Texas plantings. Comprehensive master planning for properties of every size.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting
cards.description: Professional lighting design that showcases your home's architecture, gardens, and outdoor living areas. Dramatic effects that extend enjoyment well into the evening.

how_it_works.headline: Your Vision, Brought to Life in Three Steps

steps.title: Design Consultation
steps.description: Meet with our award-winning design team to share your vision. We walk your property, discuss possibilities, and develop a comprehensive plan that reflects your lifestyle and your home's architecture.

steps.title: Expert Construction
steps.description: Our seasoned construction team brings the design to life with meticulous attention to every detail. Superior materials, proven techniques, and constant communication throughout the build.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Step into a landscape that feels like it was always meant to be. And with our concierge maintenance program, it stays pristine season after season without you lifting a finger.

about.label: Why Dallas's Finest Homes Choose Us
about.headline: 40+ Years of Designing Dallas's Most Distinguished Landscapes
about.description: Since 1984, Harold Leidner Landscape Architects has been the trusted name behind the most beautiful residential landscapes in Dallas-Fort Worth. With three offices across the metroplex and a team of 17 dedicated professionals, we handle every phase from initial concept through construction and ongoing maintenance. Our clients include some of Dallas's most prominent families, professional athletes, and discerning homeowners who demand nothing less than exceptional.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: Multiple awards for innovative landscape design. Our architects bring proven artistry and technical expertise to every project.

features.title: Full-Service, Start to Finish
features.description: Design, construction, and ongoing concierge maintenance all under one roof. One team, one vision, no gaps between handoffs.

features.title: Three Styles, Unlimited Possibilities
features.description: Whether your taste is classic, modern, or transitional, we have deep expertise in all three major design styles to match your home perfectly.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing for Every Vision.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-designed to your property and lifestyle. Schedule a consultation and we'll provide a detailed proposal with honest, upfront pricing.

guarantee.headline: Our "Craftsmanship Excellence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every project we build carries our personal guarantee of quality. If any element of our work doesn't meet the standards we promised, we'll make it right at our expense. After 40 years, our reputation is built on standing behind every landscape, every pool, and every detail we create.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool or landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope, but most custom pool projects run 3-6 months from design approval to completion. Comprehensive landscape projects can range from 2-8 months. During your consultation, we'll provide a detailed timeline tailored to your specific project.

faqs.question: Do you work with my existing architect or builder?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We regularly collaborate with architects, interior designers, and builders across Dallas-Fort Worth. Seamless coordination with your existing team ensures the landscape and outdoor living spaces complement every aspect of your home.

faqs.question: What areas of Dallas-Fort Worth do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire DFW metroplex from our three offices in Carrollton, Highland Park, and Fort Worth. Our core areas include Dallas, Frisco, Preston Hollow, University Park, Westover Hills, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after the project is complete?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our concierge maintenance program keeps your landscape, pool, and outdoor spaces in pristine condition year-round. Many of our clients have been with us for decades because we treat their properties like our own.

faqs.question: What sets Harold Leidner apart from other landscape firms?
faqs.answer: Over 40 years of dedicated luxury landscape architecture, a full-service approach from design through construction and maintenance, three DFW office locations, and a portfolio trusted by Dallas's most distinguished homeowners. We don't subcontract the important work -- our team handles it all.

testimonials.name: Ryan Marron
testimonials.text: They did an exceptional job from start to finish. They handled turf, sprinklers, new plants, pool, outdoor kitchen, driveway, and patio tile. The entire team addressed any issues that arose. A truly professional company.

testimonials.name: Troy Aikman
testimonials.text: Very pleased with our experience. We have used Harold's services on our last two homes. The quality and attention to detail is consistently outstanding.

testimonials.name: Mr. & Mrs. Carona
testimonials.text: Created a landscape that was everything we wanted and more -- a lush and beautiful English garden with multiple unique features. Our 2+ acre property in Preston Hollow has never looked better.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Living Space?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a complimentary design consultation with our award-winning team. We'll walk your property, discuss your vision, and show you what's possible.

footer.description: Award-winning landscape architecture firm. Designing Dallas's finest outdoor spaces since 1984.
